translation.The maximum number of results for {{case: The maximum number of results for {{caseTypeName}} ({{maxResultsForCaseType}}) has been exceeded. Refine your filters to reduce the number of results.
translation.The phylogenetic tree cannot be displaye: The phylogenetic tree cannot be displayed because the number of cases ({{caseCount}}) exceeds the maximum allowed number of cases ({{maxSize}}) to display a phylogenetic tree. Refine your filters to reduce the number of results.
